title: rubus calcareus
intro: Rubus calcareus, also known as the limestone raspberry or wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a bramble or thorny shrub that is native to certain regions in North America, particularly in the areas where limestone is prevalent. Rubus calcareus has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
